message:
fix: emit JSON "ask" decision for warn-severity matches in hook mode (closes #70)

When DCG runs as a Claude Code PreToolUse hook, warn-severity rule
matches previously produced no stdout and exited 0, making them
completely invisible to the AI agent (which only reads stdout JSON).

Now warn matches emit a JSON response with permissionDecision: "ask"
(Claude Code / Copilot) or decision: "ask" (Gemini), which prompts
the user for approval without hard-blocking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -122,7 +122,7 @@ pub enum DecisionMode {
     #[default]
     Deny,
 
-    /// Warn but allow (print warning to stderr, no JSON deny).
+    /// Warn and prompt (print warning to stderr, emit JSON "ask" decision).
     Warn,
 
     /// Log only (silent allow, record for history).
